Odius has a yearning for Diane, and banishes Schuyler and the boys into servitude at sea. After a shipwreck, The Three Stooges and Schuyler escape. programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank: Part Two
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

A serene and powerful sanctuary where the rhythm of the tides defines the landscape.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Locked On HBCU
programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E1 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.

programme.title: Django, Kill! 1967
programme.desc: In "Django, Kill!" Tomas Milian stars in one of the most surreal and violent Spaghetti Westerns ever filmed. Left for dead after a gold robbery, a mysterious gunslinger claws his way back to life and hunts down the traitors who betrayed him. Along the way, he enters a nightmare world of greed, cruelty, and madness where no one can be trusted. Brutal, hallucinatory, and unforgettable, this cult classic pushes the Western to its wildest limits.
